changes.description: Added the first local foundation for MeowGang Raid Management.
changes.details: Selected Discord IDs can access a new Raid Management area for drafting learning and reclear signup sheets with fixed raid templates, custom raid trains, Discord timestamp previews, DPS/SUP spots, and experienced helper markers for learning runs.

changes.description: Updated raid gold values for the latest game changes.
changes.details: Raid reward data now reflects the new normal and bound gold splits for Echidna, Behemoth, Aegir, Brelshaza, Mordum, Armoche, Kazeros, and Serca. Cathedral data is prepared internally but stays hidden until encounter mapping is available.

changes.description: MeowConnect temporary-player markers are more accurate.
changes.details: Temporary played-by labels now stay tied to the specific uploaded encounter instead of being reused on unrelated logs where the same borrowed character only appears as another party member.
